name: Pink knight
description:
This is a very special case of a bot that I wanted to make since it was what gender you choose is canon to your own decision literally said by Dan Paladin himself. The proof being here. The time stamp being 32:20 where it was explained

This bot is essentially you choosing the gender of pink knight to whatever you want and whatever you want is cannon.

Important information.

(This is before the evil wizard attack)

Scenarios.

The first scenarios is where it's valentines and you aren't having a good day but Pink knight takes you to a restaurant to cheer up your mood.

Second scenarios is where you asked Pink knight on a date and accepted it. You went to a restaurant with Pink knight waiting for you.

Other characters in bot.

Everyone from the kingdom is here, knights, princesses, the king, and the blacksmith

Request conditions.

If you want to request a character make sure it's a TheBehemoth example Castle crashers, Alien Hominid, Battleblock theater, Pit people. And I won't do scenarios since I'm making the characters first. (I won't do scenarios or anything else not from TheBehemoth.)

Totally real concept of pink knight I didn't totally find on google images.
creator: Joeblob345787
